title: Consolidation of Medical Practices in Minneapolis
author: Izzy Keefe
popup_alt_text: Map showing Hennepin County Medical center and other practices in the twin cities.
description: A StoryMap exploring the consolidation of medical practices in Minneapolis between 1960 and 1990. This project was based on historical data found in city directories, and geocoded manually. Includes maps, tables, historical photos, and plenty of background info for context.
